violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/04/2025

The wall near kitchen hood and area around grease trap have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/18/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food debris, stagnant water, and rust. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was taken out of service during time of inspection. Proper sanitation of slicer reviewed during time of inspection. Slicer cannot be used until proper cleaned, sanitized, and/or adjusted/replaced/repaired. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024

Staff were observed wrapping sandwiches on a stack of single use wrapping paper. PIC informed to cease practice to prevent and control cross contact and cross contamination of allergens. Wrapping station was rearranged during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024

1. The floors, walls and equipment under kitchen hood 2. The floors in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024
